example_tasks: Analyze nutritional content of daily intake
Research healthy recipes for the week
Track caloric intake for fitness goals

reasoning: The icon combines a fork (food/dining) with a pie chart (data/analysis). It is highly effective for tasks related to meal planning, nutrition tracking, or analyzing resource/budget distribution.
